generated_oml:
instance PermanentMagneticSynchronousMotor : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Permanent‑magnetic synchronous motor driving the first axis of the MABI MAX 100 robot."
]
instance GearboxActingComponent : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Standard gear transmission (gearbox) applying torque to the first axis."
]
instance CycloidalGearboxActingComponent : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Cycloidal gearbox providing additional mechanical motion transformation on the first axis."
]
instance MotorCurrentSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Motor current sensor mounted on the permanent‑magnetic synchronous motor."
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorCurrentDataTransmitted
]
instance MotorMountedEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Incremental position encoder mounted on the motor shaft."
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorMountedAngleDataTransmitted
]
instance PostGearboxEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Incremental position encoder mounted after the gear transmission."
    DTDFVocab:producedData PostGearboxAngleDataTransmitted
]
instance MotorCurrentDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorCurrentSensor
]
instance MotorMountedAngleDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorMountedEncoder
]
instance PostGearboxAngleDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom PostGearboxEncoder
]
instance CurrentData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real‑time motor current time‑series streamed via MQTT and tagged with metadata."
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorCurrentDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLStructuralModelEnabler, StateflowSimulinkSimulationEnabler, WhiteBoxFrictionModelEnabler, BlackBoxFrictionModelEnabler
]
instance MotorMountedAngleData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real‑time motor shaft encoder angle time‑series streamed via MQTT."
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorMountedAngleDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLStructuralModelEnabler, StateflowSimulinkSimulationEnabler, WhiteBoxFrictionModelEnabler, BlackBoxFrictionModelEnabler
]
instance PostGearboxAngleData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real‑time gearbox encoder angle time‑series streamed via MQTT."
    DTDFVocab:fromData PostGearboxAngleDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLStructuralModelEnabler, StateflowSimulinkSimulationEnabler, WhiteBoxFrictionModelEnabler, BlackBoxFrictionModelEnabler
]
instance TorqueData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Derived torque (τ) time‑series computed from motor current via analytical models."
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorCurrentDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo WhiteBoxFrictionModelEnabler, BlackBoxFrictionModelEnabler
]
instance AngularVelocityData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Derived angular velocity (ω) time‑series computed from motor shaft encoder."
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorMountedAngleDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo WhiteBoxFrictionModelEnabler, BlackBoxFrictionModelEnabler
]
instance SysMLStructuralModelEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SysML structural model of the first axis providing component relationships."
    DTDFVocab:enables JointFrictionIdentificationService
]
instance StateflowSimulinkSimulationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Stateflow/Simulink simulation environment for dynamic motor‑gearbox behaviour modeling."
    DTDFVocab:enables JointFrictionIdentificationService
]
instance MQTTBrokerEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MQTT broker enabling real‑time streaming of sensor data to the digital twin."
    DTDFVocab:enables TimeAlignedVisualizationService
]
instance AssetAdministrationShellEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shell providing contextual and descriptive metadata for the first axis."
    DTDFVocab:enables TimeAlignedVisualizationService
]
instance WhiteBoxFrictionModelEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "White‑box analytical friction models (e.g., Coulomb‑Viscous, Stribeck, Dahl, LuGre)."
    DTDFVocab:enables JointFrictionIdentificationService
]
instance BlackBoxFrictionModelEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Data‑driven black‑box friction identification models for real‑time updates."
    DTDFVocab:enables JointFrictionIdentificationService
]
instance TimeAlignedVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Dashboard service providing time‑aligned visualization of measured versus simulated joint data."
    DTDFVocab:provides ModelRealityDiscrepancyInsight
]
instance JointFrictionIdentificationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real‑time identification service for joint friction (static, kinetic, viscous) leveraging white‑box and black‑box models."
    DTDFVocab:provides FrictionLossIdentificationInsight
]
instance AutomaticFrictionParameterUpdateService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service automating updates of friction model parameters during operation."
    DTDFVocab:provides AutomaticFrictionParameterUpdateAction
]
instance ModelRealityDiscrepancyInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Visualization of discrepancies between the model and the measured data to inform maintenance decisions."
]
instance FrictionLossIdentificationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Identification of friction losses to enhance control accuracy."
]
instance AutomaticFrictionParameterUpdateAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automatic update of friction model parameters based on real‑time identification."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]
instance MABI_MAX100FirstAxisEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains PermanentMagneticSynchronousMotor, GearboxActingComponent, CycloidalGearboxActingComponent,
             MotorCurrentSensor, MotorMountedEncoder, PostGearboxEncoder
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Real‑time (continuous) data acquisition and processing; the digital shadow is updated synchronously with the robot’s operation (every sampling instant of the sensor data)."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "A single digital shadow comprising the asset definition, processing component, simulation and calculation models, data traces, and a unified dashboard for visualization; orchestrated by the processing component consuming sensor streams and producing computed traces."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "Operational stage only – the digital shadow operates during the robot’s runtime and uses sensor data collected during operation; design or manufacturing stages are not covered."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Full traceability of every data point to its source and computing model; comparison of simulated (with and without friction) vs measured data for validation; use of both analytical and data‑driven models to bound uncertainty; continuous re‑identification to maintain validity over time."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Physical‑to‑virtual data transferred over MQTT; the PT communicates via Siemens SINUMERIK 840D sl controller; the DT consumes streams and interfaces with the AAS and the dashboard over standard HTTP/JSON protocols."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "Use of Industrie 4.0 standards: Asset Administration Shell (AAS), SysML for modeling, MQTT for communication, and standard friction model equations (Coulomb‑Viscous, Stribeck, Dahl, LuGre)."
]
